guidances.note: Operating EBITDA margin guided range-bound 15-18% for FY27, from existing line of business; management flagged possible +3-4pp uplift once R-32 revenue starts in Q4FY27

Guided ~Rs 400cr funding plan: Rs 100cr promoter preferential + Rs 300cr QIP/term debt. QIP of Rs 250cr already allotted 25 Jun 2026; Rs 99.41cr preferential issue (reduced from Rs 173.48cr) pending EGM approval 30 Jul 2026
Management indicated a new 30,000 TPA AHF capacity (feeding HFC-32 captive HF demand) would be formally announced within two-three months of the May 2026 call

20,000 MTPA HFC-32 (R-32) downstream fluorinated products plant, Rs 495cr capex, on track for commissioning Q3 FY27; 65% of proposed capacity already pre-booked via long-term contracts, trying to block another 15-20%

New HF plant plus a second 20,000 MTPA Solar Grade DHF line (doubling Solar DHF capacity to 40,000 MTPA) targeted to come online together within 11-12 months of the call, i.e. around June 2027; to be formally announced within two-three months

Three long-term supply contracts (unnamed Japanese customer, unnamed MNC, Blue Star) totalling ~Rs 3,612cr over 5-7 years, signed in last 5 months before the call; execution/revenue recognition begins once HFC-32 plant commissions
Management guided FY28 revenue of approximately Rs 1,600-2,000cr (midpoint ~Rs 1,800cr) once new HF plant is also operational
Longer-term aim of Rs 3,000-3,500cr revenue in 5 years, backed by a further Rs 500-700cr of capex over the next 3-5 years (one project at a time, after R-32)
Rs 1,068cr of Solar Grade DHF orders secured for execution through FY29, booking ~85% of the 20,000 MTPA Solar DHF capacity each year; both phases already commissioned Jun and Oct 2025
